name: getApplicationLog
description: Describe how to retrieve an application log file from JATOS via the HTTP API. This tool does not perform the download itself. It provides instructions and a curl command template for downloading the log file. The download needs a user with admin privileges.

filename.description: The name of the log file to retrieve (e.g., application.log, loader.log, update.log).

success.description: True if the download instruction generation succeeded.

message.description: A message that describes the result of the operation.

downloadUrl.description: The URL to download the log file directly from the JATOS server.

curlCommand.description: Example curl command to fetch the log file.

fileName.description: The suggested filename for the downloaded log file.
